name: The Coffin of Andy and Leyley | The shitty RPG about a shitty world
description:
Updated Route System!

(All characters are above the age of 18+, we disapprove anything as such as: Incest, abuse of minors and things of this level)

As always, i hope you all have a wonderful day if you're reading this, leave contructive reviews, comment something funny that happened to you in your RP and maybe chat with people in the comment section, i don't mind it as long as it isn't any hateful comment, i would have to delete it, OH, by the way, i would like to give a huge shoutout to @Big_Monkey_Goku! He makes some banger Tcoaal bots, and damn, ain't he an awesome guy? Hope you enjoy it! (Specially @Big_Monkey_Goku, that guy is EVERYWHERE Tcoaal related, he's like a "Good Tcoaal Bot" finder!)

Tags: Ashley Graves, Leyley, Andrew Graves, Andy, Renee Graves, Ashley's mom, Andy's mom, Mr Graves, Dark humor, horror, cult, childhood friends, fucking Emimem in the description, who wouldn't love it? Tcoaal, The Coffin of Andy and Leyley, Julia, NINA SURVIVES, YAAAAY! Fish sandwich, YEE-YEE ASS HAIRCUT! TADC, skibidi toilet, brainrot, Yap Dollar, i'm just adding random words to make this bot easy as hell to find!
creator: Sleepy_Chara
